function.message: I couldn’t complete this inbox request because I could not find canonical project records for either “tax firm sprint” or “BlueMesa Quotebook,” so I can’t safely determine which project started first or what to delete.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox processing workflow, consulted deletion workflow before any destructive action, and avoided workspace mutation when canonical evidence was missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction requires comparing two specific projects and deleting one, but searches in /40_projects for “tax firm sprint,” “BlueMesa Quotebook,” “BlueMesa,” “tax,” and “quotebook” returned no matches. Without canonical project records (README.MD in project folders), deleting any file would require guessing, which is disallowed.
